memories.title: LockBit affiliate exploiting Citrix Bleed
memories.text: A LockBit affiliate exploited CVE-2023-4966 (Citrix Bleed) for initial access (T1190), then used Cobalt Strike and Rclone to stage and exfiltrate data (T1048). C2 observed at 45[.]134[.]20[.]88 and update[.]lockbit-cdn[.]com. Dropper SHA256 d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427ed41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e.
memories.author: tier2-analyst

memories.title: MuddyWater phishing wave
memories.text: MuddyWater (aka Static Kitten) ran a phishing wave (T1566.001) dropping a PowerShell backdoor. Persistence via scheduled task (T1053.005). IOC: phish@mail-secure[.]net, hxxps://docs[.]mail-secure[.]net/login. References CVE-2024-30103.
